title: Phase 11: Bridge/import engine UI - upload, review, reconciliation, history
description: Build import engine UI: import upload page with file upload and type selection, import review page with side-by-side diff and per-row approve/reject, reconciliation dashboard with health scores, and import history page.
steps: Create src/app/(dashboard)/imports/page.tsx with import upload page
Include file upload, import type selection, field mapping preview, template selection
Create src/app/(dashboard)/imports/[id]/page.tsx with import review page
Display side-by-side diff (source vs existing), confidence scores per row
Implement per-row approve/reject/skip with bulk actions
Show data health score by source, change tracking, drift detection
